title: triticum caninum f. gracilius
intro: Triticum caninum f. gracilius, also known as sweet wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum caninum f. gracilius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or supplement, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
